overview: A click-geometry debug layer that records, measures, and exports every spatial relationship in canvas clicks so the next debug export becomes a complete mathematical case file.
features: Structured 4-layer click trace record per canvas click with pointer chain, tile round-trip, combatant geometry table, and state+outcome
Draw-anchor truth recording at every combatant draw site to compare hit-test rects against actually drawn pixels
New debug module family under src/frontend/src/debug/ that shrinks WorldExploration.tsx
Debug tab Clicks sub-view rendering the ring buffer compactly
Export gains CLICK GEOMETRY TRACES and GEOMETRY SNAPSHOT sections rendered as tables
Geometry overlay dev toggle drawing crosshair and outlined sprite rects for 2 seconds after each click
Four computed invariants per record flagging round-trip, rect-anchor, near-miss, and entity-tile discrepancies with measured numbers
